localized title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
plot outline: The big-screen version of Hunter S. Thompson's seminal psychedelic classic about his road trip across Western America as he and his large Samoan lawyer searched desperately for the "American dream"... they were helped in large part by the huge amount of drugs and alcohol kept in their convertible, The Red Shark.
title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
original title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
akas: Angst und Schrecken in Las Vegas (Germany)
Miedo y asco en Las Vegas (Spain)
Miedo y asco en Las Vegas (Mexico)
